items.title: Jock Landale Out At Least Two More Weeks With High Ankle Sprain
items.blurb: Jock Landale Out At Least Two More Weeks With High Ankle Sprain — Atlanta Hawks center Jock Landale will be out at least two more weeks due to a high ankle sprain. With the Hawks set to play the Knicks in the first round, Game 4 is scheduled to take place on April 25. The series could stretch to Game 7 on May 2. Landale is averaging 10.6 points and 5.7 rebounds on the year.

items.title: Draymond Green: Ejected in season-ending loss
items.blurb: Draymond Green: Ejected in season-ending loss — Green was ejected with 1:04 remaining in the fourth quarter of Friday's 111-96 Play-In Tournament loss to the Suns after fouling out at the 1:06 mark. He closed with five points (2-4 FG, 0-2 3Pt, 1-2 FT), six assists, two rebounds and one steal across 36 minutes. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
